TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Anthony_Albanese, title = Anthony_Albanese, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anthony_Albanese} }

S.FORM: Anthony Albanese ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 3, Anthony Albanese, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Australia ta' misuw hya' ga Anthony Albanese, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2022 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1963 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Anthony Albanese ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 3, Anthony Albanese, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Australia ta' misuw hya' ga Anthony Albanese, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2022 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1963 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: antħonj alβanes~ɕe rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, antħonj alβanes~ɕe, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw aus~ɕtralia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa antħonj alβanes~ɕe, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
